message:
Merge main branch and regenerate pnpm-lock.yaml

- Merged latest main (FETCH_HEAD) into PR branch
- Checked out pnpm-lock.yaml from main and verified it with `pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile`
- pnpm-lock.yaml is now up to date with main

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

body:
---
🤖 **pnpm-lock.yaml conflict resolved**

The `pnpm-lock.yaml` merge conflict has been resolved by commit `00d9f0778e`. Latest `main` was merged into this branch and the lock file was regenerated with `pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile`.
